segments.text: Falco's also showing skilled Steve play
segments.original_text: ファルコも上手いスティーブ使いという側面を

segments.text: Laryx is putting that on display in this match right now
segments.original_text: ラリックスは今この一本で見せています

segments.text: You can really see what bothers Falco
segments.original_text: 本当にファルコ側がやられて嫌なことも分かってますかね

full_text: Falco's also showing skilled Steve play Laryx is putting that on display in this match right now You can really see what bothers Falco That's nice! KO connects!
